functions.name: Sales Engine
functions.constraint: Tom starts Monday. Anthony holding 40% close rate. Rye shifting to coaching role. DC capacity about to double.

functions.name: Mentor Journey
functions.constraint: No single owner. Connection Assessment built but not integrated into mentor matching.
functions.key_metric: 63% of churned families never got a mentor - activation gap
functions.highest_leverage_task: Integrate Connection Assessment into mentor onboarding briefing

functions.name: Member Experience
functions.constraint: 4 past-due subs ($820 at risk). 60 collecting, 8 paused. Zapier still broken.
functions.highest_leverage_task: Chase 4 past-due families + Jasmine Lund re-anchor call (Bailey reversal)

functions.name: Brand & Content
functions.constraint: Content engine operational. 18 newsletters awaiting review. Circle MVP locked for April W2.
